lighting.direction: Key light from front-left (approx. 10 o'clock), with a soft fill light or reflector from the right.
lighting.shadow_character: Soft, light, and diffused shadows, maintaining a high-key overall tone.
lighting.highlight_shadow_ratio: Low contrast, with details visible even in the darkest areas.

color.grading_style: Clean Commercial style, focusing on clarity and vibrance.

composition.focus_point: The main label on the bottle, specifically the word 'Tangerine'.
composition.composition_rule: Central placement combined with a Triangle Composition for stability.

texture.detail_rendering: Excellent rendering of textures on the orange peel and pineapple skin.

improvement_notes: Add a rim/kicker light for better separation and dimensionality. Consider subtle split toning for more color depth. Introduce dynamic elements like splashing juice or a hand model for a more engaging composition.
nano_banana_prompt: commercial product photography of [FOOD/DRINK], high-key studio lighting, bright and clean aesthetic, shot against a seamless pure white background, main light is a large diffused softbox from the left, soft fill light from the right creating minimal soft shadows, eye-level with a slight high angle, medium close-up shot, captured with a 100mm macro lens at f/5.6, tack sharp focus on the main subject, vibrant and saturated colors, color palette dominated by [MAIN COLOR] and [SECONDARY COLOR], mood is fresh, healthy, and energetic, style of Kodak Ektar 100, hyper-detailed, professional retouching --ar 4:5 --style raw --q 2
